title: Tokyo, Tokyo — Guía de Costo de Vida, Vivienda y Reubicación [2026]

Overview

Tokyo is a city in Tokyo with a population of 14,094,000. Japan’s dynamic capital blending ultramodern skyscrapers with historic temples, world-class dining, and the highest cost of living in the country.

Last updated: July 11, 2026
